description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

The weather card got smarter and bus interface language is now clearer.

• Tap weather icon to see details — Tapping the weather icon or temperature at the top of the screen now scrolls you directly to detailed weather information for that day
• Show min/max temps on heat index bar — Displays the day's lowest and highest temperatures positioned at the times when those temperatures actually occur
• Darken night hours on weather bar — The precipitation and heat index bars now show pre-sunrise and post-sunset times in a darker shade. The darkness transitions naturally from sunset through twilight, matching the actual brightness of that day and season
• Add down arrow button to home screen — When you're at the very top, an arrow appears in the bottom right. Tap it to scroll to the services list
• Change bus entry labels to "Get on here" and "Go here" — "Take bus / Return by bus" language now centers on where you are now. Stop names are also displayed larger for easier reading
• Move "Time until departure" to the top of bus countdown — When you select a bus, the remaining time timer now appears at the very top of the screen
• Rename "Hanno City Government" calendar to "Hanno City Hall" — This name change affects the "Today's Events" display and calendar sync settings (content and subscription settings remain the same)
